title: GRAVES
short description: The Grand Réseau Adapté à la Veille Spatiale (GRAVES) system is a French space-surveillance system for low-orbit (up to 1000km) satellites. Emitter is based near Dijon, France.
description: The **Grand Réseau Adapté à la Veille Spatiale (GRAVES)** system is a French space-surveillance system for low-orbit (up to 1000km) satellites. Emitter is based near Dijon, France.
